title: Seraph of the End: Vampire Reign
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 'Vampire Reign' (12) + S2 'Battle in Nagoya' (12, eps 13-24) = 24 total. Paired with the Takaya Kagami / Yamato Yamamoto manga (AniList id 73661, ongoing, ~37 volumes / latest collected ch. ~155 as of 2026, serialized in Jump SQ). The two anime seasons cover through the end of the Nagoya arc (~ch 41 / vol 11); everything from vol 12 onward is unadapted. The S1/S2 chapter cutoff is approximate due to anime reordering.

mappings.arc: Vampire Reign (S1: Prologue / Second Shibuya High / Shinjuku, vols 1-5)
Battle in Nagoya (S2: Post-Shinjuku → Nagoya arc, vols 5-11)
Post-Nagoya → Osaka → Shibuya → Akihabara → Mount Fuji & beyond (unadapted; manga ongoing)
